title: centaurea boissieri subsp. paui
intro: Centaurea boissieri subsp. paui, also known as a subspecies of the knapweed plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can contribute to its use in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea boissieri subsp. paui include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its flowers and leaves, and can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
